turnOnDescriptions: Kha vha thome ṱhalutshedzo ya zwipfi
volumeHelp: Kha vha puṱedze u swikelela bara ya volumu
volumeUpDown: U engedza na u fhungudza volumu .
statusUsingDesc: U shumisa mbekanyamushumo yo ṱaluswaho ya oḓio
statusLoadingDesc: U dzhia mbekanyamushumo i re na ṱhaluso ya zwipfi
statusUsingNoDesc: U shumisa mbekanyamushumo i si na ṱhaluso ya zwipfi
statusLoadingNoDesc: U dzhia mbekanyamushumo hu si na ṱhalutshedzo ya zwipfi
statusLoadingNext: Ndi khou dzhia track i tevhelaho
alertDescribedVersion: U shumisa vidio yo ṱaluswaho nga zwipfi .
alertNonDescribedVersion: U shumisa mbekanyamushumo i si na ṱhaluso ya zwipfi ya vidio .
fallbackError2: Browser dzi tevhelaho dzi a tendelana na player iyi .
prefTitleDescriptions: Ṱhalutshedzo ya zwipfi zwine na zwi takalela
prefTitleKeyboard: Zwine na zwi takalela kha khiibodzhi
prefTitleTranscript: Zwine vha zwi takalela zwa u ṅwalulula
prefIntroCaptions: Zwine na zwi takalela zwi tevhelaho zwi langa nḓila ine zwiṱoho zwiṱuku zwa ṋekedzwa ngayo.
prefIntroDescription1: Mutambi uyu u tikedza ṱhalutshedzo ya zwipfi nga nḓila mbili:
prefIntroDescriptionNone: Vidio ya zwino a i na ṱhaluso ya zwipfi nga fomathi naho i ifhio.
prefIntroDescription3: Shumisani fomo i re afho fhasi u itela u setha zwine na zwi takalela kha ṱhaluso ya zwipfi kha maṅwalo.
prefIntroDescription4: Nga murahu ha u vhulunga zwishumiswa, ni nga vula kana u dzima ṱhaluso ya zwipfi nga buthano ḽi fanaho.
prefIntroKeyboard1: Mutambi kha siaṱari iḽi a nga shumiswa huṅwe na huṅwe hu tshi shumiswa zwipfufhi zwa khiibodzhi (vhonani mutevhe u re afho fhasi).
prefIntroKeyboard2: U nga ṱalusa khii dza u shandukisa (Alt, Ndaulo na/kana Shift).
prefIntroKeyboard3: ṰHOGOMELANI: Dziṅwe ṱhanganyelo dza khii dzi nga kha ḓi lwisana na dzine dza shumiswa nga browser yaṋu na/kana dziṅwe tshumiso. Lingedzani u ṱanganya ho fhambanaho na khii dza u shandula u swikela ni tshi wana dzo ni fanelaho.
prefIntroTranscript: Zwikhethwa zwi tevhelaho zwi kwama u ṅwalululwa ha vhukwamani.
prefCookieWarning: U vhulunga zwine na zwi takalela hu ṱoḓea u shumisa zwidodombedzwa.
prefHeadingKeyboard1: Khii dza u shandukisa dzi shumiswa sa nḓila pfufhi dza khiibodzhi
prefHeadingKeyboard2: Nḓila pfufhi dza khiibodzhi dza zwino
escapeKeyFunction: Vhalani nyambedzano ya zwino kana popup
prefDescFormatHelp: Arali fomathi dzoṱhe dzi hone, hu ḓo shumiswa nthihi fhedzi.
prefDescFormatOption1: Vidio iṅwe i re na ṱhalutshedzo ya oḓio yo dzheniswaho (yo rekhodiwaho phanḓa).
prefDescFormatOption1b: Vhesheni iṅwe i re na ṱhaluso ya zwipfi
prefDescFormatOption2: Ṱhalutshedzo ya maṅwalo yo vhaliwaho nga muvhali wa tshikirini (TTS)
prefDescPause: Imisa vidio nga vhuḓiitisi musi ṱhaluso i tshi thoma
prefDescVisible: Sumbedzani ṱhaluso kha maṅwalo arali zwo tendelwa
sampleDescriptionText: Lugisani zwishumiswa zwaṋu u itela u pfa ḽeneḽi ḽiṅwalo ḽa tsumbo.
prefHighlight: Kha vha bvisele khagala zwo ṅwalwaho musi zwi re ngomu zwi tshi khou bvela phanḓa
prefTabbable: U ṅwalululwa hu shumaho ha khiibodzhi
sampleCaptionText: Tsumbo ya maṅwalo a ṱhoho ṱhukhu
windowMoveLeft: Fasitere ḽo fhiriselwa kha tsha monde
windowMoveRight: Fasitere ḽo fhiriselwa kha tsha u ḽa
windowMoveStopped: U tshimbila ha mafasiṱere zwo ima .
transcriptControls: Ndangulo ya Fasiṱere ḽa u Ṱalutshedzela
signControls: Ndangulo ya Fasiṱere ḽa Luambo lwa Zwanḓa
windowMoveAlert: U kokodza kana u shumisa khii dza misevhe u itela u tshimbidza fasiṱere; Kha vha ṋaṋise Enter u itela u ima.
windowSendBackAlert: Fasitere ili a ḽi nga murahu ha tshithu tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe.
windowBringTopAlert: Fasiṱere iḽi zwino ḽi phanḓa ha zwithu zwo salaho kha siaṱari.
resultsSummary4: Kha vha puṱedze tshifhinga tshi tshimbidzanaho na tshithu tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe u itela u tamba vidio u bva kha yeneyo mbuno.
enableKeyboardShortcuts: Kha vha shume zwipfufhi zwa khiibodzhi
productNameWeb: Mutambi a konaho TOTHOM Khandiso ya Webusaithi
productNameWp: Mutambi a konaho TOTHOM wa WordPress
copyrightSuffix: Webusaithi ya ṰHOḒEA. Pfanelo dzoṱhe dzo vhulungea.
webEditionDescription: Khandiso yo ṱanganedzwaho na yo engedzwaho ya tshitambiswa tsha nyanḓadzamafhungo tshi swikeleleaho Able Player. U shandukiswa na mishumo yo engedzwaho yo bveledzwaho nga TOTHOMweb ndi sofuthiwee ya vhuṋe.
wpEditionDescription: Plugin ya WordPress ine ya engedza tshishumiswa kha Elementor, yo itelwaho u ṱanganya khandiso yo ṱanganelanaho na yo engedzwaho ya mutambi wa nyanḓadzamafhungo a swikeleleaho Able Player. U shandukiswa na mishumo yo engedzwaho yo bveledzwaho nga TOTHOMweb ndi sofuthiwee ya vhuṋe.
thirdPartyDescription: Tshibveledzwa itshi tshi katela sofuthiwee ya open source i tevhelaho:
ablePlayerCopyright: © 2014-2025 Vhatambi vhane vha kona u shela mulenzhe
distributedUnder: I phaḓaladzwa nga fhasi ha milayo ya .
